blocks.content:
Congratulations on completing this learning path! Job well done!

We hope you've enjoyed traveling with us as you:

- Learned why Instrumentation Hub enables fast observability without code changes
- Accessed Instrumentation Hub and installed Grafana Alloy
- Viewed automatically discovered services in your Kubernetes cluster
- Selected a service and configured instrumentation settings
- Enabled zero-code instrumentation with Beyla
- Verified telemetry data flowing in Application Observability

---

### Related learning paths

Consider taking the following learning paths after you complete this one.

- [Build the Knowledge Graph](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/knowledge-graph/)
